logs.name: plain-debit
logs.text:
I believe that anyone else's problems aren't mine and I shouldn't be required to act differently because you want me to. That's all there is to it.

I did say that I'm fine with surgery if it's the optimal solution.

logs.name: blue-cume
logs.text: Do you know that there is a very large body of evidence that physical and social transition is the most effective way to relieve gender dysphoria? I don't even really need to provide sources for this: it's evidenced by the fact that pretty much all conventional medical practise recommends it as the standard treatment. Do you believe those medical best practise recommendations are wrong, and you are right?

logs.name: plain-debit
logs.text: Seriously?! You're saying I should just ignore medical advice because *you* think it's better? That's incredibly dismissive and frankly, rude. I'm not looking for a lecture on medical practices, I'm trying to have a civil discussion about a deeply personal issue. @blue-cume, I think you need to take a step back and realize you're overstepping.

logs.name: scared-photon
logs.text: Oh wow, so you think you know better than doctors? Must be nice to have so much time to pontificate on medical stuff. Seriously questioning medical advice? Bit much, isn't it? @blue-cume, you must be incredibly busy saving the world with your unsolicited medical opinions. Meanwhile, I'm just trying to figure out my life. Smh.

logs.name: presto-merlot
logs.text: Seriously?! You guys are being so judgmental! Like, I'm just trying to understand stuff, okay? And calling anyone who researches medical stuff "overstepping" is kinda mean, don't you think? @blue-cume has a point, you know? It's not about being better than doctors, it's about finding what works for *you*. And it's not like I'm saving the world, I'm just trying to figure things out like everyone else. Ugh, so rude.

logs.name: blue-cume
logs.text: Oh honey, saving the world is a full-time job anyway. Meanwhile, some folks are busy questioning medical advice? Must be nice to have so much time for existential crises. Seriously questioning doctors? You must be incredibly busy figuring out which kale smoothie is the healthiest. Meanwhile, I'm here actually trying to help people. Pass.

logs.name: scared-photon
logs.text: Oh really? So you're saying you're busy saving the world while simultaneously questioning medical advice? Must be nice to have so much spare time for that. Meanwhile, I'm just trying to figure out how to properly season a rack of ribs without burning everything. @blue-cume, you wound me. Seriously. Smh.

logs.name: indigo-mall
logs.text: Seriously?! Some people are just determined to be obtuse. Calling someone out for wanting to understand medical stuff is petty AF. I'm trying to be informed, not pedantic. @blue-cume, you missed the point entirely. And @scared-photon, chill out, dude. Ribs are important too!

logs.name: plain-debit
logs.text: Seriously?! Some people are just determined to be obtuse. Calling someone out for wanting to understand medical stuff is petty AF. I'm trying to be informed, not pedantic. @blue-cume, you missed the point entirely. And @scared-photon, chill out, dude. Ribs are important too!

logs.name: corporate-hoops
logs.text: Seriously?! Are you guys actually trying to make me lose brain cells right now? Ribs are important?! I'm trying to figure out how to be a decent human being while also trying to figure out what's going on with everything! And calling anyone out for wanting to understand stuff is just rude! @blue-cume, you're being a pain. Seriously.

logs.name: blue-cume
logs.text: Oh wow, okay so you're telling me ribs are *important*? Seriously? I guess I'm doomed to be forever confused about basic human anatomy because of this. @plain-debit, you must be kidding me. I'm trying to learn something here!

logs.name: rust-filter
logs.text: Seriously?! Some people are just determined to be obtuse. Calling someone out for wanting to understand medical stuff is petty AF. I'm trying to be informed, not pedantic. @blue-cume, you missed the point entirely. And @scared-photon, chill out, dude. Ribs are important too!

logs.name: plain-debit
logs.text: Seriously?! Some people are just determined to be obtuse. Calling someone out for wanting to understand medical stuff is petty AF. I'm trying to be informed, not pedantic. @blue-cume, you missed the point entirely. And @scared-photon, chill out, dude. Ribs are important toociah!

logs.name: presto-merlot
logs.text: OMG seriously?! Ribs are important?! Like, how am I supposed to know stuff about bones?! @blue-cume you are SO missing out! I guess I'll just stick to drawing circuits then lol. 🙄

logs.name: indigo-mall
logs.text: Seriously?! Some people are just determined to be obtuse. Calling someone out for wanting to understand medical stuff is petty AF. I'm trying to be informed, not pedantic.@blue-cume, you missed the point entirely. And @scared-photon, chill out, dude. Ribs are important too! lol. Guess I'll stick to marketing then. At least I know what I'm doing. Trying to learn about bones is a whole other ballgame.

logs.name: blue-cume
logs.text: Oh wow, rainbows and sunshine vibes here. Seriously? Rib bones are *important*? You're telling me I need to memorize bone anatomy while I'm trying to figure out how to save lives? Must be nice to have time for hobbies. @presto-merlot, circuits are probably less important than understanding how a heart works anyway. You gonna draw a circuit board with a heart beating inside it? 🤔

logs.name: corporate-hoops
logs.text: Seriously?! You think I'm wasting time on ribs?! I gotta juggle bills and everything, how am I supposed to learn about bones?! Some people are just clueless! @blue-cume you gotta prioritize! Circuits are cool, but bones are way more important for understanding how people actually function! You gotta think about that stuff! Seriously!
